home.subtitulo: A curated selection of destinations, flavors and local culture powered by Coppel data intelligence.
home.comidaDesc: From legendary street stalls to contemporary fine dining. Flavors that define a nation.
home.culturalDesc: Dive into ancient history. Museums, archaeological sites and world-class festivals.
home.tiendasDesc: Authentic crafts and local designer boutiques. Take a piece of Mexico home.
home.fanZoneDesc: Secure your spot at the official celebrations. Giant screens, live music and the best football atmosphere.
home.exploraInteresDesc: Smart filters designed to find the essence of every corner of our country.
home.destinoSecundarioDesc: Increase in interest for sustainable surfing
home.newsletterDesc: Receive every week a deep curation of destinations and products defining the new Mexico.

tiendas.subtitulo: Discover the official businesses that are part of the Muul experience.
tiendas.buscar: Search shops by name or product...
tiendas.sinTiendasDesc: Be the first to register your business on Muul! Use the form below.
tiendas.sinResultadosDesc: Try a different search term or category.
tiendas.registroSubtitulo: Join the most important commercial network of Mexico 2026.
tiendas.descripcionPlaceholder: Describe your business in a few words...
tiendas.terminos: I accept Muul's commercial participation terms and the processing of my data according to Muul's privacy policy.
tiendas.registroExitoDesc: Your business has been successfully registered. Our team will verify it within 24-48 hours.

tiendas.errorTerminos: You must accept the participation terms.
tiendas.errorLogin: You must log in to register a business.
tiendas.errorGpsNoSoportado: Your device does not support GPS.

perfil.sinInsignias: You haven't unlocked any badges yet. Start exploring!
perfil.empiezaAventuraDesc: Visit points of interest on the map to unlock badges. There are 10 badges available in 4 categories.
perfil.resenasDesc: Share your experiences with the Muul community.
perfil.sinResenasDesc: When you visit a place through Muul, you can leave your review here.
perfil.avanceLogros: You have completed 45% of available achievements.
perfil.resena1Texto: An incredible culinary experience. The grilled octopus is simply perfect, and the atmosphere is ideal for a special night. Definitely one of the best restaurants I have visited in Mexico City.
perfil.resena2Texto: Rodin collection is impressive. The building itself is a work of art. I recommend arriving early to avoid weekend lines. The view from the top floor is spectacular.
perfil.resena3Texto: Great variety of authentic crafts. Prices are a bit high but quality justifies it. I took home a beautiful alebrije and silver jewelry. Staff is very friendly and knows their products well.

login.heroSubtitle: Explore a new era of mobility designed for smart travelers. Precise data, curated experiences.
login.businessHeroTitle: Boost your business with the power of MUUL.
login.businessHeroSubtitle: Join the platform that connects thousands of users with your products and services in a smart way.
login.businessBenefit: Exclusive benefit: registered partners get preferred access to last-mile logistics.
login.terminosMsg: By signing up, you accept our
login.avisoNegocio: Business registrations require official document validation and take 24 to 48 hours to activate.
login.revisaCorreo: Check your email to confirm your account. Then you can log in.
login.errorMinContrasena: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.googleSoon: Google login will be available soon.
login.googleCompleteBody: Some required fields were not returned by Google. Complete the missing fields to finish your official registration.
login.googlePasswordNotRequired: Password is not required when continuing with Google.
login.googleSessionExpired: Your Google session expired. Please try again.
login.googleProfileSaveError: Unable to save your Google profile. Please try again.

chatbot.bienvenida: Hi! I'm your Muul AI guide. I can help you with everything about {nombre}. Choose a question! 🗺️
chatbot.welcomeBase: Hi. I'm your MUUL assistant and I can help you with {nombre}.
chatbot.welcomeGeneral: I can suggest places, routes, and nearby businesses.
chatbot.welcomeContext: I will respond using your currently selected context.
chatbot.security: Your information is protected by MUUL.
chatbot.limiteAlcanzado: You've reached the limit of {max} questions in this session.
chatbot.genericErrorMessage: Unable to connect to MUUL AI. Please try again.
chatbot.apiKeyOff: MUUL AI is temporarily unavailable. Enable the OpenRouter key to continue.
chatbot.noResponse: I couldn't generate a response right now.
chatbot.serviceRetrying: MUUL AI is currently saturated. Retrying with another free provider...

legal.privacyIntro: At Muul we protect your personal data and use information only to improve your experience.
legal.privacyPoint1Body: We collect account information, language preferences and in-app activity.
legal.privacyPoint2Body: We use your data to show relevant content, save routes and provide support.
legal.privacyPoint3Body: You can request data updates or deletion through support.
legal.supportIntro: Our team is ready to help you with account questions, routes, business flows and technical reports.
legal.supportChannel1Body: Find quick guides and answers for common issues.
legal.supportChannel2Body: Write to us at soporte@muul.mx and we will reply during business hours.
legal.supportChannel3Body: We usually respond in under 24 business hours.

amigos.subtitulo: Discover where your friends are and plan your next adventure together.
